Retrieval augmented generation pipelines depend on the quality of their embedding models. A good embedding model maps semantically similar passages to nearby points in vector space while keeping unrelated content far apart. Multilingual models such as bge-m3 extend this property across more than one hundred languages, which makes them attractive for heterogeneous document collections. Serving such models efficiently requires careful batching, tokenizer reuse, and attention to memory layout on both CPU and GPU targets.
